# **Konu Tasks & Tickets — User Guide**

Gmail, Google Docs, and Google Chat add-on for Odoo. Create tasks, log tickets, and link records without leaving Google Workspace.

TODO \- feel free to add comments or recommendations

## **Table of Contents**

1. [First-time setup — Generate an API key](#1-first-time-setup--generate-an-api-key)  
2. [First-time setup — Connect the add-on](#2-first-time-setup--connect-the-add-on)  
3. [Gmail — Home card](#3-gmail--home-card)  
4. [Gmail — Search Tasks and Tickets](#4-gmail--search-tasks-and-tickets)  
5. [Gmail — New Task or Ticket](#5-gmail--new-task-or-ticket)  
6. [Gmail — Log Email on an existing record](#6-gmail--log-email-on-an-existing-record)  
7. [Gmail — Drive attachments](#7-gmail--drive-attachments)

9. [Google Chat (beta)](#9-google-chat-beta)  
10. [Troubleshooting](#10-troubleshooting)

## **1\. First-time setup — Generate an API key**

Each person needs their own Odoo API key. This takes about a minute.

1. Open Odoo and click your **avatar** (top-right corner) → **My Profile**.  
2. Go to the **API Keys** tab.  
3. Click **New API Key**, give it a name (e.g. `Gmail Add-on`), and confirm.  
4. **Copy the key immediately** — it is shown only once.

Keep the key somewhere safe (e.g. a password manager). You will paste it into the add-on in the next step.

![][image1]![][image2]

## **2\. First-time setup — Connect the add-on**

### In Gmail

1. Open any email in Gmail.  
     
2. Click the **Konu** icon in the right sidebar.  
     
3. The **Settings** card opens automatically on first use.  
     
4. Fill in the fields:  
   

| Field | What to enter |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Odoo URL** | Base URL of your Odoo instance, e.g. [`https://www.konu.be`](https://www.konu.be) `! use https!` |
| **API Key** | The key you generated in step 1 |
| **Drive Folder ID** | *(Optional)* Google Drive folder ID for attachment upload — see [section 7](#7-gmail--drive-attachments) |

   

5. Click **Save & Connect**.

A confirmation message appears and the home card loads. You are done.  
![][image3]

### Updating or resetting credentials

To update your URL or API key, click **Settings** (bottom of the home card) at any time.

If you get an error on opening the add-on and cannot reach Settings, click **Clear Credentials** on the Settings card to wipe the stored values and start fresh.

### In Google Docs / Sheets and Google Chat

The same Odoo URL and API key are used everywhere. Once you have connected in Gmail, the other surfaces use the same credentials automatically — no separate setup needed.

## **3\. Gmail — Home card**

Opens automatically when you open an email.

**What you see:**

- **Sender** — the Odoo contact matched to the sender's email address.  
- **Linked to this email** — tasks and tickets already created or logged from this email thread. Click any row to open the record in Odoo.  
- **Action buttons** — Search Tasks, Search Tickets, New Task, New Ticket.  
- **Recent tasks/tickets** — the most recent records for the detected contact, sorted by date. Click any row to open in Odoo.

On each task or ticket row you will also find:

| Button | What it does |
| :---- | :---- |
| **Log Email** | Posts the current email as an internal note on that record |
| **Reply with reference** | Opens a reply-all draft with the task/ticket reference and link inserted in the body \- TODO: add catchall odoo email in cc |
|  |  |

---

## **4\. Gmail — Search Tasks and Tickets**

1. Click **Search Tasks** or **Search Tickets** from the home card.  
2. Enter a search term — task/ticket name, number (e.g. `KOTASK-001` or `HD-042`), or leave blank for all. They are ordered by most recent  
3. Optionally filter by **Project** (tasks) or **Team** (tickets) and by **Stage**.  
4. Click **Search**.  
5. Results show 10 records per page. Use **◄ Prev** / **Next ►** to navigate.

Each result shows the record number, name, stage, and assignee, and has the same **Log Email**, **Add to email**, and **Add to subject** buttons as the home card.

## **5\. Gmail — New Task or Ticket**

1. Click **New Task** or **New Ticket** from the home card (or from within a search card).  
2. The form is pre-filled from the email:  
   - **Name** — email subject  
   - **Partner** — matched sender (you can change it)  
   - **Project / Team** — suggested based on the partner's history  
   - **Assignee** — your Odoo user  
   - **Description** — email body snippet  
   - **CC** — recipients automatically added as followers after creation  
3. Adjust any field and click **Create Task** or **Create Ticket**.  
4. On success, the record number appears with an **Open in Odoo** button.

The email is automatically logged as an internal note on the new record. The record will appear under **Linked to this email** next time you open any message in the same thread.

Also: images are now saved on google drive, so everyone has acces to it and you can move them to a clients folder if needed.

## **6\. Gmail — Log Email on an existing record**

Use this when the task or ticket already exists and you just want to attach the email.

1. Click **Search Tasks** or **Search Tickets**.  
2. Find the record.  
3. Click **Log Email** on that row.

The email body (including inline images if Drive is configured) is posted to the Odoo chatter. The record is linked to the Gmail thread so it appears in **Linked to this email** on future opens.

## **7\. Gmail — Drive attachments**

When a **Drive Folder ID** is set in Settings, the add-on automatically:

1. Uploads inline images from the email to Drive and rewrites the links so Odoo chatter can display them.  
2. Uploads email attachments to Drive.  
3. TODO \- After the record is created, moves the files into `year/month` subfolders named after the record.

Without a Drive Folder ID, the email body is still logged, but inline images will appear as broken links in Odoo.

**How to find a Drive folder ID:**

Open the folder in Google Drive. The ID is the last part of the URL: `drive.google.com/drive/folders/<this-part-is-the-id>`

Paste it into the **Drive Folder ID** field in Settings and click **Save & Connect**.

Make sure the folder is accessible by everyone in the team. (eg. konu drive \- helpdesk medie \- workspace add-on files)

## **8\. Google Docs & Sheets (beta)**

The add-on works inside Google Docs and Google Sheets. Open any document and click the **Konu** icon in the right sidebar.

### Home card

- **Context** — shows the document name and any text you have currently selected. Selected text is pre-filled as the description when you create a new task or ticket.  
- **Recent linked to this document** — tasks and tickets previously linked to this document. Each row has an **Insert link** button (chain icon) that inserts the record reference as a hyperlink at the cursor position (Docs) or in the selected cell (Sheets).  
- **Action buttons** — Search Tasks, Search Tickets, New Task, New Ticket, Settings.

### Search Tasks / Search Tickets

Same filters and pagination as in Gmail. Each result has an **Insert link** button that inserts `KOTASK-001 · Task name · Assignee` as a clickable link into the document or sheet.

### New Task / New Ticket

Same form as in Gmail, with two differences:

- The description field is pre-filled with any text you have selected in the document.  
- After creation, an **Insert link** button lets you immediately insert the new record as a hyperlink.

The document is linked to the record, so it appears under **Recent linked to this document** the next time you open the add-on in the same file.

## **9\. Google Chat (beta)**

The add-on works in Google Chat spaces and direct messages.

### Home card

Send any message to the Konu app (or click its name in a space) to open the home card. It shows:

- **Recent tasks & tickets** — the 5 most recently modified records across all projects and teams, sorted by date. Click any row to open in Odoo.  
- **Action buttons** — Search Tasks, Search Tickets, New Task, New Ticket, Settings.

### Slash commands

| Command | What it does |
| :---- | :---- |
| `/task` | Open the task search card |
| `/ticket` | Open the ticket search card |
| `/help` | Show the list of available commands |
| `/config` | Open Settings to select projects and teams for this space |
| `/recent` | Show recent tasks and tickets |

### Search Tasks / Search Tickets

Use the Project/Stage (tasks) or Team/Stage (tickets) dropdowns and the search field, then click **Search**. Results are paginated (10 per page). Click any row to open the record in Odoo.

### New Task / New Ticket

Fill in the project/team and name. After creation:

- The task/ticket number and an **Open in Odoo** button are shown.  
- A **Post to Chat** button sends the reference and link as a message to the current space.

### Space memory

The last-used project (for tasks) and team (for tickets) are remembered per Chat space. The next time you open a search or create card in the same space, the filter is pre-selected.

## **10\. Roadmap**

### Gmail add-on

- [x] "Clear Credentials" button on Settings card for credential reset after server migration  
- [ ] Odoo catchall email in Settings — auto-CC the catchall address when inserting a reference into a reply, so Odoo's mail gateway threads the reply onto the record  
- [ ] AI summary — "Summarise" button on New Task / New Ticket pre-fills the description with an AI-generated summary of the email body  
- [ ] Followers selector — explicit multi-select of Odoo users as followers on task/ticket create (in addition to automatic CC followers)  
- [ ] filter 'my tasks/tickets' in “recent for this contact”  
- [ ] add checkbox in “recent for this contact” to show all contact’s companies recent tasks/tickets  
- [ ] dropdown to filter on user in task/ticket search  
- [ ] option to also log email in ‘recent for this contact’  
- [ ] option to reply with task/ticket link  
- [ ] add stakeholders in domain for tasks/ticket search, so when a contact is in stakeholder, also include task/ticket

      

### Google Chat add-on

- [ ] Create task / ticket from a Chat message via message action (right-click → Create task)

### Google Docs & Sheets add-on

- [ ] Followers selector — same as Gmail add-on

### General

- [ ] 

## **11\. TO-DO:  Troubleshooting**

### Add-on shows an error on opening instead of the home card

Your stored Odoo URL may be unreachable (e.g. after a server migration). The Settings card is shown automatically with an error message. Update your URL and API key and click **Save & Connect**. If the fields are not editable, click **Clear Credentials** first.

### "HTTP 401 Unauthorized"

Your API key is wrong or has been revoked. Go to Odoo → **avatar \> My Profile \> API Keys**, generate a new key, and paste it into the add-on Settings.

### "HTTP 403 Forbidden"

Your Odoo user does not have access to the relevant projects or teams. Ask your Odoo administrator to check your access rights.

### No tasks or tickets appear on the home card

The sender's email is not matched to any Odoo contact, so no recent records are shown. This is normal for unknown senders. Use **Search Tasks** or **Search Tickets** to find records manually.

### Ticket features not available

The Odoo Helpdesk module is not installed on your instance. Task features work normally and are not affected.

### Images not showing in Odoo chatter

No Drive Folder ID is configured. Set one in Settings (see [section 7](#7-gmail--drive-attachments)) and log the email again — previously logged emails are not updated retroactively.

### Google permissions error / add-on not loading

1. Open **Settings** in the add-on and check whether a re-authorization button appears under **Google Permissions**.  
2. If the button appears, click it and approve the permissions.  
3. If that does not help, go to **Google Account → Security → Third-party apps**, revoke the add-on's access, and reopen it in Gmail to trigger a fresh authorization.

### "Post to Chat" does nothing (Google Chat)

The Konu app must have been added to the space first. In the space, click **\+** → **Add apps** and search for Konu Tasks & Tickets.
